title: oenothera contorta var. strigulosa
intro: Oenothera contorta var. strigulosa, also known as a variety of Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera contorta var. strigulosa include relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as its potential to alleviate conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, eczema, and atopic dermatitis. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including oil, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
